plain_english_summary: Deterministic biosignal encoding system for ECG and EEG signal domains, with a Rust-backed core codec and Python package surface.
commercial_wedge: For medical-device firmware teams, clinical-data infrastructure teams, and wearable-health platform engineers needing deterministic, reproducible biosignal encoding with auditable proof lineage. Business value: reproducibility and auditability for biosignal pipelines.
technical_wedge: Deterministic 8-primitive biosignal codec with Python and Rust implementations, validated against ECG round-trip fidelity and EEG encoding paths. Wave-1 and Wave-2 readiness artifacts committed with IMC contract-consumption alignment.
ideal_first_buyer: Medical-device firmware team or clinical-data infrastructure team evaluating deterministic biosignal encoding with proof lineage (future — not current release).
deployment_model: Python package (pip install -e '.[dev]'), Rust crate (core/rust/), and embedded reference builds. Private staged — not a public packaged release.
proof_anchors: validation/results/ — committed proof and readiness artifacts
ECG validation with deterministic round-trip fidelity
IMC contract-consumption artifacts for family alignment
not_claimed: Historical validation artifact paths not fully normalized
family_position: Validates ZPE encoding generality to biosignal domains (ECG, EEG). Staged/validation tier alongside Neuro, Mocap, and Prosody.
